verse_text: The sound of exceeding joy and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; The right hand of the Lord worked its power;

links.context: Truth, love, grace and mercy are fulfilled in Christ and in His faithful in the Church. 3:1-9 The Church sees the lives of the martyrs reflected in these verses. See also [[DEU.33:3]]; [[JOB.12:10]]; [[PSA.117:15]].
